subcodes.first_line: O ye two faithful servants of the Abha Beauty! For some time now, no dawning or rising hath been witnessed from Farooq [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده باوفای جمال ابهی مدتی بود که از فاروق بزوغ و شروقی مشاهده نشده
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
